statement.markdown: Given two strings, `s1` and `s2`, implement a function that returns their concatenated string. The function should handle non-empty strings and null inputs. Ensure it doesn't produce unexpected output or exceptions when concatenating two non-empty strings
statement.inputFormat: Two strings `s1` and `s2`, which can be non-empty or null
statement.notes: Note that null strings should be handled correctly

hints.text: Check for null strings before concatenation

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: string solve(string s1, string s2) { return s1 + s2 + s1; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: class Solution { public String solve(String s1, String s2) { return s1 + s2 + s1; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def solve(self, s1: str, s2: str) -> str: return s1 + s2 + s1
